description_long: This is an adult human figure with a bald head, dressed in casual attire suitable for an urban environment. The individual is wearing a sleeveless vest layered over a long-sleeve shirt and a pair of jogger-style pants. The figure's arms are slightly extended outward, and the hands and feet are bare, with no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing appears to be loose-fitting and comfortable, typical for everyday streetwear. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and a neutral, upright stance. The surface of the figure is matte, with smooth transitions between clothing and skin.
description: A bald adult figure in casual, loose-fitting streetwear with a sleeveless vest, long-sleeve shirt, and jogger pants, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bald head, facial features, sleeveless vest over a long-sleeve shirt, and jogger pants with arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the layered clothing, and the relaxed fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vest, shirt, and pants, with the arms and legs symmetrically positioned.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and the contours of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless vest over a long-sleeve shirt and jogger pants
